message.content:
PreOne  
The Operating System for Modern Preschools  

PARENT COMPLETE JOURNEY MAP  
Every Moment. Every Memory. Every Milestone.  

PARENT VALUE  
- Stay Connected  
- Build Trust  
- Be Informed  
- Peace of Mind  
- See Growth  
- Preserve Memories  


### 1 SCHOOL DISCOVERY & ADMISSION  
Parent inquires, visits & takes admission for the child.  
*Mobile screen: School Details (Little Stars Preschool, Programs: Play Group, Nursery, LKG, Timings: 9:00 AM – 1:00 PM, Admission Open 2024-25, Inquiry Now button)*  


### 2 PARENT REGISTRATION & CHILD PROFILE  
Parent registers, adds child & family details.  
*Mobile screen: Welcome to PreOne (Create your account, Enter OTP, Add Your Child, Continue button)*  


### 3 CHILD SELECTION  
If parent has multiple children, select the child to view details.  
*Mobile screen: Select Child (Aarav Sharma, Siya Sharma, + Add New Child button)*  


### 4 PARENT DASHBOARD  
Get a summary of today’s updates at a glance.  
*Mobile screen: Hi Priya, Aarav Sharma (Today at a Glance: Attendance, Meals, Mood, Sleep, Potty, Home, Memories, Chat, Growth, More icons)*  


### 5 DAILY UPDATES  
View real-time activities, food, sleep, mood & more through the day.  
*Mobile screen: Today’s Timeline (Free Play, Drawing Activity, Lunch Time, Nap Time, Outdoor Play)*  


### 6 PHOTOS & VIDEOS  
Beautiful moments captured and shared instantly.  
*Mobile screen: Memories (Today, Yesterday, Photos, Videos, Albums tabs)*  


### 7 CHAT WITH TEACHER  
Two-way communication with teacher & school.  
*Mobile screen: Chat (Neha Teacher, Aarav was very active in today’s drawing activity. Well done! ❤️, That’s great to hear! He loves drawing. ❤️, Yes, he did amazing! 🎉)*  


### 8 FEE PAYMENT  
Secure & easy fee payment with multiple options.  
*Mobile screen: Fee Details (April 2024, Due, ₹4,500, Due Date: 10 Apr 2024, Pay Now button, Recent Payments: ₹4,500)*  


### 9 CHILD GROWTH REPORTS  
Track overall development across key areas with AI insights.  
*Mobile screen: Growth Overview (Overall Progress: 85%, Great Progress! 🎉, Communication 90%, Social Skills 80%, Creativity 85%, Cognitive 88%, Physical 78%, View Detailed Report button)*  


### 10 AI PARENT COACH  
Get AI-powered suggestions & guidance personalized for your child.  
*Mobile screen: AI Parent Coach (How can AI help you today? My child is shy in front of others. AI Suggestion: Encourage small group activities, storytelling & role play at home. Praise every small interaction to build confidence. View More Tips button)*  


### 11 CHILDHOOD PASSPORT  
A digital portfolio of all memories, achievements & milestones.  
*Mobile screen: Childhood Passport (Photos & Videos 245 items, Achievements 12 badges, Certificates 8 Certificates, Milestones 15 Moments, View Timeline button)*  


### 12 NOTIFICATIONS  
Stay informed with important updates & announcements.  
*Mobile screen: Notifications (All, Unread, Important tabs, Holiday Notice, Fee Reminder, Annual Day, View All Notifications button)*  


### 13 GRADUATION & BEYOND  
Celebrate every milestone and preserve memories for a lifetime.  
*Mobile screen: Milestone (Congratulations Aarav! You have completed Play Group. Share the Moment button)*  


### A LIFELONG JOURNEY  
From First Day to Graduation and Beyond...  
- 2024 First Day at School  
- 2024 First Friend  
- 2024 First Drawing  
- 2025 First Achievement  
- 2026 Annual Day  
- 2027 Graduation Day  
All memories. One place. Forever with PreOne. ❤️  


### OUR PROMISE TO PARENTS  
We don’t just manage school operations, we become a part of your child’s journey and help you cherish every moment.  


### THE EMOTIONAL JOURNEY  
You Trust Us With Your Child → We Care Every Day → We Capture Every Moment → We Track Every Growth → We Celebrate Every Success → We Preserve Every Memory → You Cherish Forever  


### PARENT BENEFITS  
- Real-time Updates  
- Transparency & Trust  
- Easy Communication  
- Track Growth & Milestones  
- Secure & Safe Platform  
- Peace of Mind
